title: gonocaryum calleryanum
intro: Gonocaryum calleryanum is a type of flowering plant in the family Annonaceae, commonly known as the Chinese custard apple or custard apple tree. This plant is rich in medicinal properties, particularly its seeds, which contain a compound called annonacin that has been shown to have neuroprotective effects and potential anti-cancer properties. The health benefits of Gonocaryum calleryanum include its ability to alleviate symptoms of Parkinson's disease, improve cognitive function, and exhibit antimicrobial and antifungal activities, making it a valuable resource for traditional medicine. In herbal preparations, the seeds are often used to make teas, extracts, and capsules, although further research is needed to fully understand its effectiveness and potential side effects.
